# How to get your Facebook Access Token
# 1. Log in to your Facebook account.
# 2. Go to Facebook’s Graph API Explorer: https://developers.facebook.com/tools/explorer/
    or create a Facebook App in the Facebook Developer portal.
# 3. Generate an access token using the tool, selecting the required permissions.
# 4. Copy the generated access token and paste it below (replace this text).

# WARNING: Never share your token publicly. It grants access to your Facebook data.
